name: Roasted Red Pepper & Chive Dressing
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Prepared roasted red peppers (or 1 whole roasted red pepper)
recipeInstructions:
1. Roast the red pepper over a flame until evenly charred, or cut it in half and place under the broiler until blackened.
2. Wrap the roasted pepper in plastic wrap and let it cool.
3. Scrape off the burned skin and remove seeds and stem.
4. In a blender or food processor with a steel blade, combine the roasted pepper, vinegar, and garlic.
5. Process until the mixture is pureed, slowly drizzling while the machine is running.
This recipe, featured at Neiman-Marcus, was created by caterer George Dolese. He serves this dressing over a salad of fusili pasta, fresh mozzarella chunks, julienned zucchini, and sliced smoked chicken, accompanied by blanched asparagus.
